Legacy path is still active in streams/cluster.rs (decoded_primitive_arcs populated), geometry.rs (PidGraphicKind::Arc emitted), schema.rs (Arc -> SheetRecordKind::PrimitiveArc typed mapping), tests/parse_real_files.rs (expected_probe_entities includes decoded_arc_count and decoded_arcs whitelist), and parser_panic_safety.rs (decode_primitive_arcs/decode_primitive_arc_at matrix). Destructive migration requires user strategy decision per blockers B1-B3.

User selected full removal of the legacy PrimitiveArc/decode_primitive_arcs surface and removal of old PSM 0x0030 Arc emission. Keep generic PidGraphicKind::Arc available for future true arc sources; remove this misidentified PSM 0x0030 path.

Removed parser API decode_primitive_arcs/decode_primitive_arc_at, parser DTO SheetPrimitiveArcDecoded and all GARC2D_* constants. Removed model DTO DecodedPrimitiveArcRecord and SheetGeometry::decoded_primitive_arcs field. Removed cluster.rs pipeline population. Removed cfb/reader.rs SheetGeometry test fixture field. Removed geometry.rs emission path for PSM 0x0030 to PidGraphicKind::Arc and decoded_sheet_record_kind mapping. Removed SheetRecordKind::PrimitiveArc variant and primitive_arc default schema entry. Renamed PSM_TYPE_CODE_GARC2D const to PSM_TYPE_CODE_JSTYLE_OVERRIDE. Added SheetDecodedGeometryKind::Annotation variant and jstyle_override default schema entry. Updated pid_inspect --geometry-summary CLI to drop misleading Arcs line and add Annotations counter. Preserved generic PidGraphicKind::Arc enum variant (decoded_sheet_record_kind returns None for it now). Wrote Phase 17 entry in CHANGELOG.md including consumer migration note.
